events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: American singer, actress, and dancer Jennifer Lopez was born in New York City on July 24, 1969.

angles.name: J.Lo's Influence
angles.copy: Celebrating J.Lo's 57th! From global hits to iconic movie roles, she's been a force in music and entertainment for decades.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, was born in Dartford, Kent, England, on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: The legendary Mick Jagger is 83! Still strutting, still singing, still the ultimate rock 'n' roll frontman.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) officially launched on August 1, 1981, with its very first music video being 'Video Killed the Radio Star' by The Buggles.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? 45 years ago today, the channel that changed music and pop culture forever launched.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, becoming the fastest-selling debut album in British history at the time.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. The album that defined a generation and kickstarted Britpop. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, billed as '3 Days of Peace & Music', took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A legendary moment in cultural history.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91 this year, having been born in 1935.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley today, 49 years since we lost the King of Rock and Roll. His music and legend live on.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, would have been 55
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur, a legendary figure in hip-hop, was shot dead in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996. He would have been 55 this year, born in 1971.

angles.name: Tupac's Impact
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, a voice that shaped a generation, 30 years after his passing. His legacy in music remains profound.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, widely regarded as one of the greatest guitarists in history, passed away on September 18, 1970. He would have been 84 this year, born in 1942.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering Jimi Hendrix today, 56 years since we lost a true guitar visionary. His sound redefined rock music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs – pure magic. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the American-British singer, songwriter, and founding member of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! The voice and force behind The Pretenders, still rocking.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: William John Paul Gallagher, the distinctive lead singer of Oasis, was born in Manchester, England, on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to Liam Gallagher! The unmistakable voice of Britpop and a true rock 'n' roll star.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic single 'Imagine' in the US on October 11, 1971, a timeless anthem for peace.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A powerful song that continues to inspire.

events.title: First iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how people listened to music on the go.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple launched the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, commemorating the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', on this date in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 64 years of 007's cinematic adventures, gadgets, and unforgettable theme tunes.

events.title: Remembering John Lennon, would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, the influential singer-songwriter and co-founder of The Beatles, was born on October 9, 1940. He would have been 86 this year.

angles.name: Lennon's Birthday
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. A true musical icon whose legacy continues to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: English actor, comedian, and writer John Cleese, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the one and only John Cleese! A true titan of British comedy, from Python to Fawlty Towers.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' released 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' ninth studio album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles released their groundbreaking 'White Album'. A double LP packed with diverse and influential tracks.
